records.summary: DialogSourceIssueMaterializer owns exact @aurelia/dialog source diagnostics for bare DialogConfiguration registration, invalid static DialogService.open(...) settings, and missing child dialog settings keys.
records.rationale: @aurelia/dialog throws some errors from source-authored configuration/service shapes before live dialog activation. Semantic-runtime now owns the closed static subset as DialogIssue products and app diagnostics, while lifecycle and renderer failures remain intentionally separate future substrate.
guidance: Start here before adding dialog diagnostics or changing dialog framework-error dispositions.
Use framework.errors for the dialog package and the Aurelia dialog sources before spending another AUR09xx authority row.
Current exact source-owned codes are AUR0903 dialog_settings_invalid, AUR0904 dialog_no_empty_default_configuration, and AUR0910 dialog_child_settings_not_found.
Do not claim dialog activation, deactivation, or renderer visibility codes until semantic-runtime admits deeper dialog runtime substrate.

anchors.summary: Dialog lane ownership and remaining intentionally unclaimed authorities.
Pressure fixture for the exact dialog source diagnostics.
Pressure harness includes dialog issue and app-diagnostic summaries.
